calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2004 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-29-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Appearances:
Matthew Davis, Esq. for Petitioner: Michael Torre present as guardian ad litem for Kara Tore and Kaitlin Torre a minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and Compromise is approved.
Compromise: $200,00.00
Costs for $4,214.00.
Attorney's fees: $48,946.00
Balance $146,839.50 to purchase the annuity for Claimants as set forth in EXHIBIT-A of the ODRDER. From the balance, the amount of $839.50 for both minors ($419.75 each) to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 1590 Grant Ave., Novato, CA. until each minor's reaches the age of 18.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim of Minor signed in open court.
Counsel to submit an order for the DEPOSIT Money Into Blocked Acount directly to Dept. 218.

Order to Deposit Money Into Blorcked Account for the Minors received in court on Feb. 20, 2004, and submitted to Comm. Kaplan for signature.
Order signed.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2004 Continued To Mar-09-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for defendant. The OSC is re-set to 3/9/2004 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Rhonda Fung. (212)

Doris Cheng, Esq., Walkup, Melodia, Kelly, 415-981-7210, for plaintiff/opposing party Kara Torre.
